_readme: LLM Provider Configuration for V3AM FOB Termux
_note: This file is merged into fob-config.json. Edit fob-config.json for the authoritative config.

llamacpp.name: llama.cpp (local)
llamacpp.description: Local LLM running via llama.cpp server. Built from source during setup.sh.

anthropic.name: Anthropic Claude
anthropic.description: Anthropic's Claude API. Fast and capable. Set api_key in fob-config.json.

gemini.name: Google Gemini
gemini.description: Google Gemini API. Free tier available. Set api_key in fob-config.json.

switching.note: To switch provider, change 'provider' in fob-config.json llm section
